captures.request_content_type: application/json or application/connect+json (Connect-RPC / gRPC-web style fully-qualified service method path)
captures.response_content_type: application/connect+json (Connect streaming) / text/event-stream — RPC streaming envelope
captures.transport_protocol: Connect-RPC / gRPC-web style RPC (POST to fully-qualified ServiceName/Method path). Streaming response. NOT plain REST and NOT classic SSE path; uses Connect protocol framing.
captures.success_response_wire_sample: Body not byte-readable via Claude-in-Chrome taint-guard. Endpoint /apiv2/kimi.gateway.chat.v1.ChatService/Chat returns a Connect-protocol streamed sequence of message-delta envelopes (length-prefixed Connect frames carrying JSON). Client renders into div.chat-detail-content / segment markdown. Observed final text: '안녕하세요! 반갑습니다. 무엇을 도와드릴까요?'. Raw Connect frames require CDP/HAR.
captures.frame_separator: Connect-RPC envelope framing: 5-byte prefix (1 flag byte + 4-byte big-endian length) per message frame. Inferred from Connect service-path convention; exact bytes need CDP/HAR.
captures.dom_render_structure: Vue SPA (vue-router: router-link-active / router-link-exact-active classes; no Next/#__next). Layout: div.chat-page.chat > div.chat-detail-content > div.chat-detail-main; header = header.chat-header-content. Sidebar div.sidebar-new-chat / a.new-chat-btn / div.chat-info > span.chat-name. Message segments rendered with Edit/Copy/Share actions.
captures.framework: Vue 3 + Vue Router (router-link-active markers). Custom-named utility classes (chat-page/chat-detail-*).
captures.auth_state: logged-in (existing session, account 최장희) — NO new login performed (Chinese-site constraint respected; account was already authenticated)
captures.console_errors: Not separately polled; /api/device/register 200, chat RPC succeeded, response rendered normally.

notes: etap-BYPASSED clean baseline. 중국 사이트 — account was ALREADY logged in (최장희), so used existing session; no new login attempted. KNOWN quirk handled: submitted via send button (not Enter). Most notable structural fact: chat transport is Connect-RPC/gRPC-web style (/apiv2/kimi.gateway.chat.v1.ChatService/Chat) — fully-qualified protobuf service path, distinct from REST/SSE peers. Response rendered normally. Wire bytes taint-guarded -> CDP/HAR for raw Connect frames.
